summary: Experiment m0b: verdict PASS. Hypotheses: M0B-COVERAGE-GATE. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.3542001386155407; sec-by-rung(secondary)={'kernel-v0': 0.2210239418867505, 'molecules-v0': 0.3542001386155407, 'wn31-aligned': 0.7841253037698164}. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): P3 §1.1 m0b.gate consequence (RT-7, verbatim): 'coverage < X ⇒ every verdict template renders a NICHE-SCOPE banner and any frontier-pitch route must carry an explicit coverage-growth cost line — a gate with a consequence, not just disclosure.' Pre-declared default X = 20% of the target task family's content-word mass (GNG-0 ratification default, P7 second-pass verification list). FAIL here binds the NICHE-SCOPE banner; it does not stop Tier-1 (P1 §5: none of Tier 0 blocks Tier 1, but GATE-T1 requires m0b.close + m0b.gate evaluated). Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): M0b has no P1 §4b row: coverage is corpus-indexed, not model-indexed. The measured coverage number extrapolates to NO other corpus or rung; it is restated verbatim with its rung in every later verdict (P2 G-7) and re-measured as the kernel grows (coverage-growth curve, P7 RT-11/§10).
title: Registry verdict: m0b
